title: Immediate Requirement Store Manager at Decathlon India Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Store Manager at Decathlon India Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Decathlon India Advisory Limited! We are hiring a Store Manager for our Gwalior team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Decathlon India Advisory Limited:
Decathlon India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Retail Operations

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Decathlon India Advisory Limited!
